pages.text:
LIETUVOS RESPUBLIKOS PREZIDENTAS

PRESIDENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF LITHUANIA

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the

Convention for the Establishment of the European and

Mediterranean Plant Protection Organization done at Paris on 18 April 195 and amended by the Council on 27 April 1995, 9 May 1962, 18 Septembe 1968, 19 September 1973, 23 September 1982 and 21 September 1988;

WHEREAS it is provided in paragraph a of Article XX, of the said

Convention that it shall remain open for signature or for accession by those

Governments which become parties to it in accordance with the provisions of Article III;

WHEREAS the decision was taken

Republic of Ritus it to decision a an taker of the raunail no

the Council to invite the

cosidered and Or See Convention Republe Estabishmet having considered and approved the

Convention for

European and Mediterranean Plant Protection Organization hereby formaily declares the ratification of the said Convention and undertakes faithfully to perform and carry out the stipulations therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I, Valdas Adamkus, President of the Republic of

Lithuania have signed this Instrument of Accession and affixed the seal of the President of the Republic of Lithuania.

DONE at Vilnius on 17 June 1998.

VALDAS ADAMKUS

President of the Republic of Lithuania

Dang

ALGIRDAS SAUDARGAS

Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Lithuania
